title: Meridian Accord of Ironquay
content:
The Meridian Accord of Ironquay (1950) was a diplomatic agreement in which Greta Fairchild, peace delegate of Confederation of Frosthaven, helped finalize terms at Cindermark.

Negotiations.

Greta Fairchild, serving as peace delegate, chaired preliminary talks that began in spring 1949. Neutral observers from neighboring cantons attended the sessions.

Primary sources.

Archived minutes from the Cindermark conference hall include Greta Fairchild's opening address and the ratification roll call.
